mapper.sql: id, talk_id, user_id, session_id, question_id, talk_status, video_url, error_message, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_talk WHERE talk_id = #{talkId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_talk SET talk_status = #{talkStatus}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
